mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_identity where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and identity_type = #{type} and is_deleted = 0
select * from aiw_user_identity where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_identity (biz_id, user_biz_id, identity_type, identity_value, normalized_value, verified, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{identityType}, #{identityValue}, #{normalizedValue}, #{verified}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update identity_value = values(identity_value), normalized_value = values(normalized_value), verified = values(verified), status = values(status), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_identity set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
